evidence.codeVerification: MapView component uses onMove callback that fires continuously during pan/zoom (react-map-gl's onMove event). DataReadout receives lat/lng/zoom as props from parent state updated via onMove.

steps.observed: Found panel showing LAT 40.6944, LNG -73.9213, ZOOM 15.00
Computed fontFamily: "Share Tech Mono", "Share Tech Mono Fallback"

steps.action: Verify Entry Plug Green text color
steps.observed: rgb(88, 242, 165) confirmed = #58F2A5

steps.expected: onMove fires during pan/zoom, not only on release
steps.observed: MapView uses react-map-gl onMove event which fires continuously during interaction. Values passed as props to DataReadout.

steps.action: Attempt live update verification via map drag
steps.observed: Could not verify live updates in headless Chrome — map drag requires WebGL which is unavailable. Code structure confirms continuous updates are wired correctly.

VAL-EVA-004.issues: Live coordinate updates could not be verified interactively due to WebGL unavailability in headless Chrome (known environment limitation per AGENTS.md). Code review confirms the onMove handler fires continuously during pan/zoom and updates DataReadout props.

blockers.description: WebGL is unavailable in headless Chrome (SwiftShader GPU failure). MapLibre map canvas renders blank. This prevents interactive testing of map pan/zoom to verify live coordinate updates in VAL-EVA-004.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Attempted native mouse drag via agent-browser and synthetic JS MouseEvents. Map does not respond without WebGL. Verified correct wiring via code review instead.

summary: Tested 9 assertions: 9 passed. All EVA UI chrome elements (scanlines, vignette, header, data readout, hex grid) render correctly with proper styling, fonts, colors, pointer-events, and responsive layout. Live data readout updates (VAL-EVA-004) verified via code review since map interaction requires WebGL. Only console error is the expected WebGL context creation failure from MapLibre (documented known limitation).
